title: California History Maps: Interactive Cartography of Spanish and Mexican California
description: Interactive, source-cited maps of Spanish and Mexican California (1769-1848): military engagements, expeditions, mission and presidio systems, population, Native nations, and the imperial frontier, keyed to the manuscript record of the Archives of California (BANC MSS C-A, the Savage transcripts) and the printed primary and secondary literature. The plotted, verified synthesis is the citable object; base tiles and the underlying public-domain sources belong to their institutions. Companion cartographic site to the Archives of California documentary calendar (doi:10.5281/zenodo.21327098). Live interface: https://maps.archivesofcalifornia.com/
